title: Does Water Explode - NS Blow-Up

analysis.object: T549: Does Water Explode - NS Blow-Up depth analysis

physical_non_observation.description: No physical blow-up observed; viscosity regularizes real fluids
physical_non_observation.reason: Physical fluids stay EML-2/3; molecular discreteness prevents EML-inf blow-up

equation_vs_physical.description: Blow-up may be mathematical artifact: NS equations assume continuum
equation_vs_physical.reason: NS equations are EML-inf in their continuum assumption; physics is EML-0 molecular

viscosity_firewall.description: Viscosity is universe firewall against depth-inf: dissipates EML-3 before EML-inf
viscosity_firewall.reason: Viscosity as depth reducer: keeps fluid at EML-2/3, prevents EML-inf eruption
